titles.title: Letter for Hosea (You Looked Beyond My Faults)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A Holy King chose me to be his wife, I was dressed in fine linen clean and white, A man approached me, showed me his kingdom, Great pleasure for my flesh but I know this is whoredom, But the pressure pulled me to hold his hands, The sinful treasures of this world I glanced, I gained his wealth but I was blind and deaf, A drop of tear from heaven

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was unfaithful and defiled Unqualified to be your wife Brought you pain and scars and tears in your eye, You looked beyond my faults Because you saw my needs Undeserving but you called And promised a vow for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I couldn't feel my husbands presence I was judged, guilty and condemned The man who defiled me was delighted As I was walking stripped and naked, Throughout my walk I hear him whispering, Im a slave desperate to be redeemed But how can I beg when I know my sins A drop of tear from heaven

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And then my husband came to pay the price, All the shame, the times I’ve been defiled Pain in his eyes reaching his arms to me, there’s a reason that's why I let you free I have redeemed thee, you are my wife, death holds before, but I gave you life I’ll remember your sins no more, For you’ll reign with me in that city

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I was unfaithful and defiled Unqualified to be your wife Brought you pain and scars and tears in your eye, You looked beyond my faults Because you saw my needs Undeserving but you called And promised a vow

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Undserving but you called And promised a vow for me
